title: Goat Villagers
description: Changes the texture and model of villagers,  iron golems, wandering traders, and zombie villagers to that of a vanilla based goat. Also changes the professions. Audio by KhaMika on PMC
body:
Changes the texture and model of villagers and iron golems to that of a vanilla based goat. Also changes the professions. 

**Optifine/CEM is required**
